title: Gentler Rain Sounds
description: Replacement audio for rain // Rain sounds from Gentler Weather Sounds
body:
Standalone rain sounds from Gentler Weather Sounds

While I love what I've made with Gentler Weather Sounds (and I highly suggest using it!), I also understand that a complete replacement might not be everyone's cup of tea. So this pack offers just the rain audio!

The Resource Pack selection screen may show a warning on older versions but the audio works back to 1.7!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sounds Used Any uncredited sounds are designed/ recorded by me All sounds have been edited to work together better [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/rain-and-thunder-nature-sounds-7803/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/rain-and-thunder-nature-sounds-7803/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/soft-rain-ambient-111154/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/soft-rain-ambient-111154/) [https://freesound.org/people/shelbyshark/sounds/513394/](https://freesound.org/people/shelbyshark/sounds/513394/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/copyright-free-rain-sounds-331497/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/copyright-free-rain-sounds-331497/) [https://freesound.org/people/Soundrack/sounds/733288/](https://freesound.org/people/Soundrack/sounds/733288/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/calm-rain-ambience-421001/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/calm-rain-ambience-421001/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/nature-soft-distant-rain-with-birds-for-sleep-432019/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/nature-soft-distant-rain-with-birds-for-sleep-432019/)
